_description: Named source profiles for quick profile switching. Activate a profile by enabling/disabling sources in sources.json to match the profile's source list. Run: bash scripts/activate-profile.sh <profile_name>

minimal.description: Single source, quick feedback loop. Use for initial setup and rapid iteration.

production.description: Multi-source baseline with balanced coverage. Recommended for daily operation.

full.description: All configured sources including experimental and low-weight sources.
